title: Reordering columns in the information widget
excerpt:

posts.author: rbeckwith (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
I want to be able to reorder the way I see the columns in my information widget on an item card. Rather than them showing up in the order they are in on the board.
For example, in this widget I want to be able to put the “Existing Customer” column at the bottom, but I don’t want it reordered on the board just on the information widget on the item card.

image714×723 21.1 KB

posts.author: ArthurSanford (Arthur Aureliano Sanford Guimarães)
posts.cookedHtml:
That would be such a useful feature!

i’ve always need to go and reorder everything on default table because in the widget view it looked awful.

Monday please get a look into it!

posts.author: fharper (Frédéric Harper)
posts.cookedHtml: I thought I just didn’t know how to do it. I never thought it was because it’s not possible… It should be a basic functionality.
